main.title: Mortgage Refinancing
main.insuranceTitle: Payment protection insurance for {0} per month on top of the repayment
main.insuranceTitleDisabled: Payment protection insurance will cover risks and lower interest rate
main.footer: This calculation is for illustrative purposes only. You will receive the exact calculation and your loan terms during the online application. See a See a representative example.

insurance.title: What will you receive?

coverage.text: Up to 12 monthly loan instalments if you need to take care of a family member, become involuntarily unemployed, experience a business interruption or termination or become temporarily disabled.
A lump-sum payment equal to 12 instalments in the event of minimal permanent disability.
Repayment of the outstanding balance in the event of partial permanent disability, total permanent disability, issuance of a disability card (ZTP/P), or death.
24/7 online doctor - immediate access to a qualified doctor who can, for example, issue e-prescription or referrals for medical examinations.

insurance.termsAndConditions: Payment protection insurance is not available to anyone who already has a permanent disability (whether minimal, partial, or total). For full details, please refer to the document Information about the Intermediary and Payment Protection Insurance Brochure 2026

propertyPriceSheet.title: What is the estimated property value?

loanAmount.title: How much is left to be repaid?
loanAmount.info: You can get the best interest rate if you borrow up to 80% of the estimated property value.
loanAmount.infoYoung: We primarily offer mortgages exceeding 80% of the estimated property value to clients under the age of 36.
loanAmount.infoOverLtv: Protože poskytujeme hypotéku maximálně na 90 % z ceny nemovitosti, automaticky navýšíme celkovou cenu nemovitosti.

maturity.title: How long do you wish to repay the mortgage?
maturity.youngClientMessage: If you’re under 36, you may be able to choose a mortgage term longer than 30 years for your first or second mortgage, as long as you are or will become the owner of the financed property.

interestInfoSheet.title: How can I get the best interest rate?
interestInfoSheet.detail:
You can get the best interest rate by borrowing up to 80% of the estimated property value. 

We generally offer loans up to 80% of the estimated property value. However, clients under 36 years old may qualify for a higher loan amount, up to a maximum of 90% of the estimated value.

exampleInfo.title: Representative Example
exampleInfo.detail: Loan amount 2 500 000 CZK, repayment period 30 years, number of repayments 360, fixed-rate period 3 years.

content.title: With Payment Protection Insurance from BNP Paribas Cardif Pojišťovna, a.s.:
content.text:
・monthly mortgage repayment: 13,405 CZK
・monthly insurance premium: 1,474 CZK
・interest rate: 4.99 % p.a.
・APR: 6.11 % 
・total amount due: 5,374,722 CZK

content.title: Without Payment Protection Insurance:
content.text:
・monthly mortgage repayment: 13,712 CZK
・interest rate: 5.19 % p.a.
・APR: 5.33 %
・total amount due: 4,953,903 CZK

content.title: What is NOT charged:
content.text:
・loan processing
・oan account management
・current account management

content.title: What is charged:
content.text:
・Collateral suitability assessment fee: CZK 3,000
・Fee for submitting a lien registration request: CZK 2,000 per request
・Fee for submitting a lien removal request: CZK 1,600 per request
・Fee for signature verification on the Mortgage Collateral Agreement: CZK 50

content.title: Further conditions:
content.text:
・The loan must be secured by a mortgage on the property, and the collateral value must not be disproportionately low compared to the secured claim.  
・Property insurance (for the collateral) is required for the entire duration of the loan agreement. The cost of this insurance is not included in the APR, as its exact amount is unknown at the time of calculation.

footers:
The advertised interest rate is subject to maintaining a monthly credit income of CZK 15,000 in the account designated for mortgage repayments.  
The APR and the total amount payable by the borrower are calculated based on the assumption of a single borrower, a single guarantor, and a single collateral property. The calculation also assumes a loan amount of up to 80% of the property's value.  
If the loan is repaid in a currency different from the one in which it was issued, the loan amount and monthly repayments may fluctuate due to changes in the foreign currency's value relative to CZK.
Disclaimer: The displayed calculations and figures are for illustrative purposes only. Loan approval is not guaranteed, and the offer is non-binding.
